accent-ink-hover.$description: Interim value under the 3a role split (INC-252 Phase 1b): every current consumer is interactive and moves to action-ink in Phase 1c; retirement candidate thereafter — advisory decision, do not delete preemptively.

action-ink.$description: Action-tier interactive text ink (cranberry) — text links, active nav, selected states; hover lands on the brand tier per the 3a role map. Consumers (INC-252 Phase 1c): text links (contact, card title, article), the card affordance line, and the pill CTA fill. 6.57:1 vs background / 7.16:1 vs surface, ≥ 4.5:1 link-text floors — proven via the exported contrast-proof math (the frozen prove row list predates this token; see the Phase 1b record).

action-ink-hover.$description: Hover for action-ink — lands on the brand tier (3a rule: hover ON brand, one step deeper only when pressed). 8.44:1 vs background / 9.20:1 vs surface, ≥ 4.5:1 floors — proven via the exported contrast-proof math (INC-252 Phase 1b).

inverted-foreground-muted.$description: Solid composite of 72% white over inverted (stone neutral.900, #1e1c19), computed in encoded sRGB by the INC-242 derive algorithm (`scripts/contrast-proof.mjs` exported math) — deterministic, no alpha in the token (re-derived for the stone ramp, INC-252).

inverted-accent.$description: On-dark accent for inverted surfaces — large-text/fill usage only, 6.79:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 3:1 non-text/large floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-244; repointed to oxblood.300, INC-252; 3a rose retune, Phase 1b).

code-foreground.$description: Default code text on the inverted code-block surface — 17.00:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 small-text floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251; re-proven vs the stone inverted, INC-252).

code-comment.$description: Syntax: comments — muted but 9.29:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 small-text floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251; re-proven vs the stone inverted, INC-252).

code-keyword.$description: Syntax: keywords — same primitive as inverted-accent but a distinct SMALL-TEXT contract: 6.79:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 floor (inverted-accent's own contract stays large/fill-only); proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251; repointed to oxblood.300, INC-252; 3a rose retune, Phase 1b).

code-string.$description: Syntax: strings — warm gold, semantic-tier literal (`inverted-foreground-muted` precedent; INC-251's boundary excludes tokens/primitive/), 10.79:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251; re-proven vs the stone inverted, INC-252).

code-function.$description: Syntax: functions/constants — soft periwinkle, the palette's one deliberate cool counterpoint (syntax-only, not brand usage; ratified in INC-251 planning), 9.78:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251; re-proven vs the stone inverted, INC-252).
